cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Anthony could have gone to the bookstore. Let me start by listing all the events mentioned and their times. First, Anthony woke up at 7am. Then, David saw him working at the office from 7am to 8am. So that's 7-8am. Then, Leslie saw Anthony getting coffee at the cafe from 8am to 11am. So that's 8-11am. Then, Sarah saw him watching a movie from 1pm to 9pm. The bookstore was closed after 9pm, so he has to go before that. So let's map out Anthony's schedule based on these observations: 7am - 8am: Working at the office (David) 8am - 11am:
